stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Have a look at the attached figure NET LEVEL-OFF ALTITUDE. Why are the temperature lines broken at 17 000 ft?

options.a: The air condition is turned off below 17 000 ft.
options.b: Usually there is an inversion at 17 000 ft.
options.c: Fuel dumping can be started at 17 000 ft and above.
options.d: The air condition is turned off above 17 000 ft.
